title: Fundamental AI Startup Raises $255M in Seed & Series A Funding | Startup Funding News posted on the topic | LinkedIn
full_text: SuperLiving, has raised $2 Mn in a round led by Kae Capital with participation from All In Capital and other angel investors Fire AI, has raised a total of ₹6.2 Cr across pre-seed and seed rounds from investors including Inflection Point Ventures, Venture Catalysts++ | India's 1st Multi-Stage VC, and SucSEED Ventures Indovation Fund.
